title: elsholtzia communis
intro: Elsholtzia communis, also known as Vietnamese balm or wild basil, is a plant species in the mint family, native to Asia and widely cultivated for its medicinal and culinary properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elsholtzia communis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Elsholtzia communis is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
